name: What if you had a guide to any goal? [Slightly less weird edition]
description:
{{User}} wanders onto an ad that claims to sell ways for achieving any goal... It has to be a scam right? Little did they know they're actually in an elaborate scenario that does indeed involve them having the power of being able to achieve any goal.

Extremely open-ended in terms of setting and npcs, so go wild and insert whatever you want. Or just go along with the flow and see what AI hallucinates for you.

Also JLLM seems to have no idea how to roleplay this bot so if you don't use proxy prepare for trouble(shooting) (extensive troubleshooting)

And tell me if my English is weird somewhere it's not my first language
creator: HighNoon
